steps.title: Follow the series pattern
steps.content: The sentence lists three Nobel Prize winners. The first item already contains internal punctuation and is followed by a semicolon, so the list uses semicolons to separate its major items.

steps.title: Separate the second item
steps.content: Choice A gives no clear boundary before the third item. Choice B uses a comma, which does not match the semicolon pattern. Choice C uses a colon, which would introduce rather than separate. A semicolon after “Stanford” completes the series. The answer is D.
